projects.title: Smart Driver Monitoring System (Face Recognition Focused)
projects.description: Collaborative engineering project with Master's students to build a facial-recognition based driver monitoring platform. The focus of the work centered on hardware architecture, system integration, and infrastructure required to support remote monitoring and secure connectivity.
projects.challenge: The project required integrating multiple embedded subsystems into a compact platform capable of operating in real-time automotive environments. Ensuring reliable connectivity, stable data transfer, and secure remote access while maintaining low-power edge hardware constraints was a major challenge.
technical_execution: Designed and integrated hardware architecture using Orange Pi Zero 3 as the edge compute platform. Custom PCB boards were developed to accommodate LTE communication modules and peripheral sensor interfaces.
Implemented secure remote infrastructure using VPN-based connectivity combined with NGINX reverse proxy and Cloudflare routing for secure external access.
Deployed backend support services on AWS EC2 and AWS Lambda to handle device communication and remote diagnostics.

projects.title: Orang Buta Assistant – Braille Learning System
projects.description: Assistive learning system designed to help visually impaired users learn Braille characters through tactile buttons combined with real-time audio feedback.
projects.challenge: The primary challenge was designing an intuitive interaction interface that visually impaired users could operate easily while ensuring clear audio feedback and reliable input detection.
technical_execution: Developed a hardware interface using ESP32 microcontroller connected to tactile input buttons representing Braille characters.
Integrated an audio output system through an amplifier module and speaker to deliver immediate voice feedback for each pressed character.
Implemented firmware logic to map physical button inputs to corresponding Braille characters and trigger the correct audio playback.

projects.title: Three-Phase Energy Monitoring System (Undergraduate Thesis)
projects.description: Final undergraduate thesis project conducted in collaboration with Prasetiya Mulya University focusing on the development of a cloud-connected three-phase energy monitoring system.
projects.challenge: The system needed to accurately capture real-time electrical measurements across a three-phase grid while maintaining reliable data synchronization with cloud infrastructure.
technical_execution: Designed an IoT-based monitoring device using Wemos Lollin microcontroller integrated with PZEM004T energy measurement modules.
Implemented real-time data transmission to AWS cloud infrastructure using EC2 compute services and Lambda event processing.
Configured AWS S3 for long-term data storage and historical monitoring analysis.

spec.cloud_stack: AWS EC2, AWS Lambda, AWS S3

projects.title: Internal IoT Development – PT Synapsis Synergi Digital
projects.description: Participated in internal product development focusing on embedded systems integration using ESP32 and Raspberry Pi platforms with multiple industrial sensors and communication protocols.
projects.challenge: The engineering task involved ensuring compatibility between multiple industrial communication standards while maintaining reliable sensor data acquisition and processing.
technical_execution: Developed firmware interfaces supporting communication protocols including RS485, RS232, Modbus TCP, and Modbus RTU.
Integrated multiple sensors such as SHT environmental sensors and industrial interface modules via I2C, UART, and SPI communication buses.
Performed system-level debugging and testing to ensure stable device communication across heterogeneous hardware platforms.

projects.title: Solar PV Energy Monitoring System
projects.description: Developed an energy monitoring and control platform for a solar photovoltaic installation used for research and performance analysis.
projects.challenge: Collecting reliable sensor data from solar infrastructure required custom hardware interfaces and stable long-distance communication over industrial serial networks.
technical_execution: Designed custom PCB boards using ATmega328 microcontroller integrated with ESP8266 modules for network communication.
Implemented RS485 serial communication modules to transmit energy and environmental sensor data.
Integrated environmental sensors including thermistors, humidity sensors, and flow meters to capture operational data for research purposes.

projects.title: Office Network Infrastructure Rework – PT Delta Rezeki Abadi
projects.description: Redesigned the entire office network architecture by merging two separate buildings into a unified infrastructure with centralized services and multi-ISP redundancy.
projects.challenge: The infrastructure needed to support multiple internet providers while ensuring failover capability and reliable internal connectivity across buildings.
technical_execution: Implemented fiber optic backbone connections between two buildings to create a unified network environment.
Configured Linux-based server for access control and print server services.
Integrated four ISP connections through industrial routers to improve network reliability and bandwidth distribution.

projects.title: Production Line Bottle Counter System
projects.description: Developed an IoT-based production monitoring system capable of counting bottles produced across multiple manufacturing lines in real time.
projects.challenge: The system needed to operate reliably within industrial environments while maintaining accurate detection rates and centralized reporting.
technical_execution: Implemented ESP01 microcontroller nodes connected to optical proximity sensors for bottle detection.
Integrated Raspberry Pi gateway to collect sensor events from multiple production lines.
Deployed backend monitoring infrastructure on AWS EC2 to visualize production data.

projects.title: Faraday Energy Monitoring Prototype
projects.description: Developed an early prototype of an energy monitoring device capable of measuring electrical parameters and transmitting the data to a backend server.
projects.challenge: Building a reliable sensor interface capable of measuring voltage and current accurately while integrating multiple environmental sensors in a compact embedded device.
technical_execution: Implemented ESP32 microcontroller as the central processing unit for sensor acquisition and communication.
Integrated voltage, current, temperature, and humidity sensors including ACT013 and DHT12 modules.
Added actuator components such as relay control and OLED display for real-time device status feedback.

projects.title: Decentralized Solar-Based Power Station Research Project
projects.description: Collaborative multidisciplinary research project focused on building decentralized solar-based power station technology integrating energy monitoring and automation concepts.
projects.challenge: The research required building a scalable monitoring system capable of capturing energy metrics from solar installations while supporting future automation development.
technical_execution: Developed sensor-based monitoring system using Arduino Nano and ESP01 communication modules.
Integrated voltage and current measurement circuits designed specifically for solar PV infrastructure.
Implemented backend communication architecture to transmit monitoring data for analysis and research purposes.
